title: Strip CSRF token machinery if present, use SameSite cookies
description: If the OAuth authorize form has hand-rolled CSRF token generation/validation, strip it. SameSite=Strict on the session cookie provides browser-native CSRF protection. Or delegate to Caddy/WAF. The in-memory token store doesn't survive restarts. Reference: gaja commit 3cf3634.
close_reason: No CSRF token machinery exists. App uses stateless Bearer auth, no cookies. OAuth form requires admin password, not vulnerable to CSRF.
